Q5 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

For the circuit shown below, what should be the value of resistance ‘Rs’ so that load RL = 2 kΩ will get maximum power?

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
To get maximum power to load resistance (RL), ‘Rs’ should be as minimum as possible. Hence, option (d) is most suitable answer.

Q6 Not checked

Not attempted

Consider the circuit shown in the figure below:

The Thevenin’s equivalent resistance seen across the terminal A and B is ________ Ω.

NAT
Correct answer: 10.4
Solution

10.4 (10.1 - 10.7)

Q7 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

NAT
Correct answer: 10.29
Solution

10.29 (10.00 - 11.05)

Q17 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A RLC circuit having resistance R = 10 Ω, inductance L = 2 mH and capacitance C is connected such that:
Condition I: For getting quick oscillation free output for an ac input in series connect RLC circuit.
Condition II: We get quality factor (Q) equal to 3 if the above elements are connected in parallel.
Considering the above information, select the correct option(s).

 

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, c, d)
